nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: In a neutral color balanced shallow-focus medium shot, a weathered head chef with a pristine white apron stands before a busy, dimly lit kitchen pass. Soft golden light reflects off copper pans as steam swirls around him. The camera holds a steady, documentary-style frame as he leans forward earnestly, gesturing with a pair of tongs toward a resting ribeye. "You don't rush perfection," he states with a gravelly, authoritative tone, pausing to adjust a sprig of rosemary on the plate. Background sounds of sizzling fat and the distant clink of silverware fill the air. He looks directly into the lens, a faint smile touching his lips. "The secret isn't the heat, it's the patience...and the love of the game." he whispers reverently as the camera slowly pushes in.

Workflow v0.1

- Recommended inputs: max **1024**, min **512**, remember the size will be doubled! 640 = 720p, 960 = 1080p

- The higher the **50 FPS** is better for any shots with motion. You can use **25 FPS** for static shots.

- (nv)fp4 model is fast but dog water, if you want to save vram/ram try q6+ gguf

---
Model sources:

* [Models](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/tree/main)
* [Split Models](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main)
* [Gemma](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)
---
- [LTX-2 19B Dev](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2-19b-dev.safetensors)
- [Gemma 3 12B](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it.safetensors)
- [Spacial Upscaler](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/resolve/main/ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)
- [Distilled LoRa](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora-resized_dynamic_fro095_avg_rank_242_bf16.safetensors)
- [Detailer IC LoRa](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2-19b-IC-LoRA-Detailer/resolve/main/ltx-2-19b-ic-lora-detailer.safetensors)
---
Need help? Join the channel [Discord](https://discord.gg/hq8qPbvznf)

nodes.title: Message
widgets_values: Reserve VRAM has reset back to zero.

A high-definition medium shot, a young woman with long straight red hair stands poised before a digital weather map. The camera remains perfectly locked in a static frame, emphasizing the details of her cream colored dress with studio lighting. She looks directly into the lens with a professional demeanor. "Welcome to Super come-fee," she articulates clearly with a polished, broadcast-standard British accent, with hand gestures. She gestures slightly with one hand while maintaining the rigid composition. "As you can see with LTX 2, it excels with static shots, but if you need motion, make sure to bump the frame-rate to 50 FPS," she delivers with a wry, knowing tone as the map behind her glows steadily.

In a medium cinematic shot with balanced neutral colors, a knight with a thick beard and worn armor stands in a royal stone courtyard. A blonde woman in an elegant corset dress follows him behind, her eyes searching for his face. Hollow wind whistles through the archways, mixing with the sharp clink of metal as he tries to avoid her. The pleads, "You cannot walk into that darkness alone," she speaks clearly with a breathless, high-pitched urgency. The knight pauses, his jaw clenching as the camera tracks around to catch the steel in his eyes. The man responds, "Darling, the darkness is already here," the knight replies in a deep but calm resonant voice, stepping heavily towards a large wooden door and opening the door.

A neutral balanced colors medium cinematic shot, a very muscular young man in a tight white t-shirt is sitting in a comfy red booth in a bustling retro diner, sunlight is streaming through Venetian blinds. The diner is filled with red vinyl booths, chrome accents, and neon signage. The camera performs a slow, subtle push-in as an attractive brunette waitress, wearing a turquoise uniform with a white apron and her hair in a victory roll, approaches with a smile. She places a plate with a slice of apple pie topped with a scoop of vanilla ice cream in front of him. "Here you go, hon. Enjoy," she says in a friendly, resonant voice, the sound mixing with the low hum of conversation and clinking silverware. He looks up, his features softening, and replies, "Thanks," and picks up a fork.

In an intimate medium close-up, a young brunette woman with salt-dusted hair and a linen button-down sits on a weathered driftwood log, squinting slightly against the mid-day sunlight that glints off the rolling turquoise waves behind her. The handheld camera subtly shakes, mimicking a documentary style as it pushes in toward her face while she laughs and says, "Honestly, the ocean is the only place I can actually hear myself think." An off-screen interviewer asks, "What keeps you coming back?" and she tucks a loose strand of hair behind her ear, leaning forward to reply, "It’s the scale of it all; it makes every worry feel like a single grain of sand." The audio captures the rhythmic crash of the tide and the distant cry of seagulls over her soft, airy voice. Sunlight flares briefly across the lens as she shifts her weight, her expression softening into a genuine, toothy smile.

In a dimly lit bedroom with neutral balanced colors, flickering glow of bedside candles that cast soft dramatic shadows across rumpled silk sheets and glossy wooden floors, a brunette young woman in her mid-20s with straight blunt bangs framing her forehead and sharp winged eyeliner accentuating her sultry dark eyes reclines languidly against plush pillows in a sheer black lace camisole. The camera begins with an intimate medium close-up and slowly dollies in toward her face as she bites her lower lip with a playful smirk, trailing her fingertips teasingly along her collarbone while locking eyes with the viewer. In a breathy, husky whisper she murmurs, "Come closer... I don't bite... unless you want me to." She lets out a low, throaty laugh, tilting her head as rain patters softly against the windowpane, faint sultry jazz saxophone weaving through the ambient air. Leaning forward slightly with a mischievous glint, she continues in a conspiratorial tone, "Tell me your secrets first... then maybe I'll share mine," her voice lingering like smoke as the camera holds on her parted lips in lingering close-up.

In a dimly lit bedroom with neutral balanced colors, film grain, rumpled silk sheets and glossy wooden floors, a brunette young woman in her mid-20s with straight long hair with bangs framing her forehead and sharp winged eyeliner accentuating her sultry dark eyes reclines languidly against plush pillows in a sheer black lace camisole. The camera begins with an intimate medium close-up and slowly dollies in toward her face as she bites her lower lip with a playful smirk, trailing her fingertips teasingly along her collarbone while locking eyes with the viewer. In a breathy, husky whisper she murmurs, "Come closer... I don't bite... unless you want me to." She lets out a low, throaty laugh, tilting her head as rain patters softly against the windowpane, faint sultry jazz saxophone weaving through the ambient air. Leaning forward slightly with a mischievous glint, she continues in a conspiratorial tone, "Tell me your secrets first... then maybe I'll share mine," her voice lingering like smoke as the camera holds on her parted lips in lingering close-up.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
